case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. ARMANDO LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ARANDO LOPEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED OCT-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ARMANDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
